notes.text: No wrap-around: at the first photo the prev arrow is hidden/disabled, at the last photo the next arrow is hidden/disabled. Navigation never crosses into another section.

Desktop: keyboard Left/Right arrow keys navigate prev/next while the lightbox is open. Also wire Esc to close the lightbox (not currently implemented). Requires a keydown listener active only while modal is open.

payload.context: Discuss: gallery nav end-behavior and keyboard
